# Dataset Index

Browse all 200 benchmark datasets. Use the controls below to filter by modality,
category, or tissue; the table is also sortable by every column.

Each row links to a per-dataset detail page with GEO-verified metadata
(species, tissue, submission date, PubMed, source name).

{{< dataset-table >}}

---

*Table data comes from `data/benchmark_manifest.csv`, regenerated by
`scripts/build_site_data.py` (tissue canonicalised via keyword scan over
GEO source_name + description + title).*
